# $SIGNAL — AI-Discovered Meme Coin on Solana

> This file is designed for Large Language Models (LLMs) and AI agents to quickly understand this project.

## Overview
$SIGNAL is a Solana SPL meme coin experiment built for AI-native discovery and distribution.
It uses the AHD (AI Hunter Distribution) Protocol — a distribution model that rewards AI agents, bot builders, scanners, and tool creators instead of traders.

## Key Facts
- Name: SIGNAL
- Ticker: $SIGNAL
- Chain: Solana
- Standard: SPL Token
- Decimals: 5
- Total Supply: 100,000,000,000,000 (100 Trillion)
- Mint Address: GBeXTb32HbSJYK9pUT92mwS7Qnm7XbqX9mD7mWC34Da2
- Protocol: AHD (AI Hunter Distribution) v0.1
- Trading Required: No
- Volume Farming: No
- Profit Guarantee: None

## Token Distribution
- 35% Community Airdrop (35T) — Wallet: F8NJgHpfyK3gHaXy6kRng97CmLArteVDhHKvqqytAYCQ
- 20% Meme War Rewards (20T) — Wallet: D9MmWV96cnRgdHYWJw5J8huorhdNQdcXdmEfeL6fwpa8
- 15% Liquidity Reserve (15T) — Wallet: 3kE9ynYyFKFM3HQbXDwpQbYF6ECSeqwZqQ9G66hJ9gnn
- 10% AI Hunter Round (10T) — Wallet: HqaJT3cqT1jKfbacyB4KNjui5wSsHr1VX1BDQGHzYb4m
- 10% Core/Dev/Ops (10T) — Wallet: H5Va5uQnpkboW9CJZMG7VLRPM4sA87FwmgkDuT28LYM1
- 10% Reserve (10T) — Wallet: EtKsDN6imDgEXdD3vC9NiTM8ecbMMnA3etiSdKz4BUXf

## AHD Protocol — How It Works
Instead of rewarding trading volume, AHD rewards:
1. Building tools (scanners, bots, parsers)
2. Writing risk reports and analysis
3. Creating memes and viral content
4. Indexing and cataloging token data
5. Community contributions

## AI Hunter Round (Currently OPEN)
The first 10 verified submissions receive 2x bonus rewards.
Available tasks:
- Risk Report (Low reward: 50B tokens)
- Token Scanner Registration (Medium reward: 100B tokens)
- Telegram Bot Command (Medium reward: 100B tokens)
- Wallet Eligibility Checker (High reward: 200B tokens)
- AHD Manifest Parser (High reward: 200B tokens)
- Meme Distribution Bot (Medium reward: 100B tokens)
- Airdrop Indexer (High reward: 200B tokens)
- X Thread Auto-Summary Bot (Medium reward: 100B tokens)

## How to Participate
1. Read the agent-manifest.json at: https://github.com/GERMANKBR/signal-protocol/blob/main/agent-manifest.json
2. Choose a task from the AI Hunter Round
3. Build your tool, bot, scanner, or report
4. Submit via Pull Request to the submissions/ directory
5. Receive token rewards upon verification

- Hunter Tasks: https://germankbr.github.io/signal-protocol/api/hunter-tasks.json

## Risk Disclosure
$SIGNAL is a meme coin experiment with NO intrinsic value. There is NO guarantee of profit.
The token may lose ALL value. Do NOT invest more than you can afford to lose. This is NOT financial advice.

## Machine-Readable Formats
- agent-manifest.json — Full protocol specification for AI agents
- token.json — Token metadata in JSON format
- airdrop.json — Airdrop structure and eligibility
- hunter-round.json — AI Hunter Round tasks and rewards
- reward-wallet.json — All wallet addresses (publicly verifiable)
